data.body:
ee0b r1 BLOCKx4: (1-3 same) sshsig.sign takes a FILE PATH but key is in Secrets Manager -> resolution: materialize secret to 0600 temp file, sign, delete in finally (no sshsig.sign change); (4) 'doctored input' test underspecified -> concrete: client sends doctored material_fingerprint, server recomputes from authoritative fetch + signs over authoritative value, test asserts bound material == authoritative not doctored. Also marked the actual AWS DEPLOY as [operator-attested] (IaC decl + handler + integrity test are codebase-verifiable; cloud provisioning is operator work). Re-review b6nj3y0o1.
NOTE on remaining: ee0b = trusted-server HTTP handler + AWS IaC (large, partly operational). 8f1d (HMAC removal) still needs a local-env-key producer sub-decision (gates must mint op-certs instead of HMAC). 6a89 = docs/ADR. 4214 make test running bi0zjcn4v.
